the same interface as real Aave V4 ISpokeBase so frontends      can switch between mock and real Aave with zero code changes. Key differences from real Aave: - No borrowing/debt mechanics (yield is simulated via configurable APY) - Yield is minted on-demand (requires mintable token like MockUSDCV2) - No liquidations, health factors, or risk parameters - Single admin, no AccessManager complexity The share math uses the same RAY precision (27 decimals) as real Aave.","kind":"dev","methods":{"addReserve(address,uint256,bool)":{"params":{"annualYieldBps":"Annual yield in basis points (500 = 5% APY)","mintableYield":"Whether to mint yield tokens on params.annualYieldBps: Annual yield in basis points (500 = 5% APY)
params.mintableYield: Whether to mint yield tokens on withdrawal
params.underlying: The token address (must be mintable for yield)

returns.reserveId: The ID of the new reserve

getUserSuppliedAssets(uint256,address).details: EXACT same signature as Aave V4 ISpokeBase.getUserSuppliedAssets()

returns._0: The amount of underlying assets (principal + yield)

getUserSuppliedShares(uint256,address).details: EXACT same signature as Aave V4 ISpokeBase.getUserSuppliedShares()

params.annualYieldBps: New annual yield in basis points

supply(uint256,uint256,address).details: EXACT same signature as Aave V4 ISpokeBase.supply()

withdraw(uint256,uint256,address).details: EXACT same signature as Aave V4 ISpokeBase.withdraw()

params.amount: Amount of underlying to withdraw (use type(uint256).max for all)
params.onBehalfOf: Address to debit shares from (must be caller)

RAY().notice: RAY precision (27 decimals) - matches Aave's WadRayMath

SECONDS_PER_YEAR().notice: Seconds per year for APY calculations

convertToAssets(uint256,uint256).notice: Convert shares to assets (for yield calculation)

getReserveLiquidityIndex(uint256).notice: Get current liquidity index for a reserve

getReserveSuppliedAssets(uint256).notice: Get total supplied assets in reserve (including yield)

getUnderlyingAsset(uint256).notice: Get the underlying token address for a reserve

getUserSuppliedAssets(uint256,address).notice: Get user's supplied assets including accrued yield

setYieldRate(uint256,uint256).notice: Update yield rate for a reserve

userShares(uint256,address).notice: User shares by reserveId and user address
